sections.label: THINKING
sections.content: The SPACE action caused the white U-shape to rotate! It was pointing down (red blocks below) and now it's pointing right (red blocks to the left). So SPACE rotates the white object. The puzzle seems to be about rotating the white U-shape so its red blocks can be inserted into the green frame's green frame. Let me check what changed.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']
for n in nodes:
    if n['color'] in ['W', 'R', 'N']:
        b = n['boundary']
        minr = min(p[0] for p in b)
        maxr = max(p[0] for p in b)
        minc = min(p[1] for p in b)
        maxc = max(p[1] for p in b)
        info = "id=%d color=%s b=[%d-%d, %d-%d]" % (n['id'], n['color'], minr, maxr, minc, maxc)
        print(info)
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
